FR-01.title: User Registration and Subscription
requirements: Register with email or social login
acceptance_criteria: Trial starts and expires after 30 days

FR-02.title: Video Upload and Processing
requirements: Creators upload videos up to 4K resolution
Video metadata: title, description, tags, category

FR-03.title: Video Playback
requirements: Playback controls: play, pause, seek, volume, fullscreen
acceptance_criteria: PiP works while browsing other content

FR-04.title: Content Discovery
requirements: Personalized recommendations based on watch history

FR-05.title: Watchlist and History
requirements: Add videos to watchlist for later

FR-06.title: Like, Comment, and Share
requirements: Share via link or social media
Creator can pin and delete comments

FR-07.title: Channel Management
requirements: Creators create and customize channel page
acceptance_criteria: Analytics show views, subscribers, and revenue

FR-08.title: Live Streaming
requirements: Start live stream from creator dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Stream starts and viewers can watch

FR-09.title: Content Monetization
requirements: Ad insertion before and during videos
acceptance_criteria: Super chats highlighted in live chat

FR-12.title: Subtitle and Accessibility
requirements: Accessibility: screen reader and keyboard navigation

FR-01.title: Build Auth and Subscription API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/social. POST /api/subscriptions (plan selection and payment). Free trial with 30-day expiry. Subscription status checking middleware.

FR-01.title: Build Registration and Plan Selection UI
FR-01.description: Create signup flow, plan comparison cards (free/basic/premium with features), payment form for paid plans, and trial activation screen.

FR-02.title: Build Video Upload Pipeline
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/videos/upload (chunked upload to S3). Queue transcoding job (360p, 480p, 720p, 1080p, 4K). Generate thumbnails at intervals. Store metadata. Notify creator on completion.

FR-02.title: Build Upload Interface
FR-02.description: Create upload page with drag-drop zone, progress bar, metadata form (title, description, tags, category, thumbnail selector from generated options), and publish/draft toggle.

FR-02.title: Create Video Database Schema
FR-02.description: Design videos collection: id, creator_id, title, description, tags, category, thumbnail_url, sources (quality→URL map), duration, status (processing/published/private), views, likes, created_at.

FR-03.title: Build Streaming API
FR-03.description: Create GET /api/videos/:id/stream (adaptive bitrate manifest HLS/DASH). Track playback position. CDN integration for global delivery. Bandwidth detection for quality selection.

FR-03.title: Build Video Player
FR-03.description: Create custom player with adaptive streaming, progress bar with preview thumbnails, quality selector, speed control, volume, fullscreen, PiP, and keyboard shortcuts.

FR-04.title: Build Recommendation Engine
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/recommendations (collaborative + content-based filtering from watch history). GET /api/trending (time-weighted view counts). GET /api/search (full-text with autocomplete). Browse by category.

FR-04.title: Build Homepage and Browse UI
FR-04.description: Create homepage with recommendation rows (carousel), trending section, search bar with autocomplete dropdown, and category browse grid.

FR-05.title: Build Watchlist and History API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/watchlist/:videoId (toggle). GET /api/watchlist. Automatic history tracking via playback events. GET /api/history. POST /api/videos/:id/progress (save position). DELETE /api/history.

FR-05.title: Build Watchlist and History Pages
FR-05.description: Create watchlist page with video cards and remove buttons. History page with date-grouped videos. Continue Watching row on homepage with progress indicators.

FR-06.title: Build Engagement API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/videos/:id/like, /dislike (toggle). POST /api/videos/:id/comments (threaded with parent_id). Creator: POST /api/comments/:id/pin, DELETE. Share endpoint with metadata.

FR-06.title: Build Engagement UI
FR-06.description: Create like/dislike buttons with counts, comment section with reply support, pinned comment highlight, and share modal with link copy and social buttons.

FR-07.title: Build Channel API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/channels (setup). PATCH /api/channels/:id (customize). POST /api/channels/:id/subscribe. GET /api/channels/:id/analytics (views, subs, revenue over time).

FR-07.title: Build Channel Pages
FR-07.description: Create channel page with banner, avatar, sub count, tabs (Videos, Live, About). Creator studio with video manager, customization editor, and analytics dashboard.

FR-08.title: Build Live Stream API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/live/start (generate stream key and RTMP endpoint). WebSocket for live chat. POST /api/live/:id/end (save recording). Real-time viewer count via Redis.

FR-08.title: Build Live Stream UI
FR-08.description: Create live viewer with stream player, real-time chat panel, viewer count badge. Creator dashboard with stream controls, chat moderation, and stream health indicators.

FR-09.title: Build Monetization API
FR-09.description: Create ad insertion service (pre-roll, mid-roll). POST /api/channels/:id/membership (tiers). POST /api/live/:id/superchat (highlighted message with payment). Revenue tracking and payout calculations.

FR-09.title: Build Monetization Dashboard
FR-09.description: Create creator revenue page with earnings charts, ad revenue breakdown, membership stats, super chat history, and payout schedule.

FR-10.title: Build Moderation System
FR-10.description: Create content scanning pipeline for policy violations. Strike system: 1 warning, 2 upload restriction, 3 channel termination. POST /api/appeals (creator appeal). Age-restriction gate.

FR-10.title: Build Moderation Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create admin moderation queue with flagged content, strike management, appeal review interface, and age-restriction toggle per video.

FR-11.title: Build Download API
FR-11.description: Create POST /api/videos/:id/download (premium only, quality selection). DRM packaging. Track downloads. Expire after 30 days. Limit concurrent downloads.

FR-11.title: Build Download UI
FR-11.description: Create download button with quality selector. Downloads page showing downloaded videos with expiry countdown. Offline playback player.

FR-12.title: Build Subtitle Service
FR-12.description: Create auto-subtitle generation using speech-to-text API. POST /api/videos/:id/subtitles (SRT/VTT upload). Multi-language support. GET subtitle tracks by language.

FR-12.title: Build Subtitle UI
FR-12.description: Create subtitle display overlay on player. Language selector in player controls. Subtitle styling options (font size, background). Screen reader ARIA labels for all controls.
